title: Session 08 — To the Underdark
bodyText:
# What happened
Last errands: Brolin's delivery operation with **Filbert**; Cumb's bag inventory turned up **two corpses with raw S-marks** cut into their arms. At the Underdark entrance **Varen broke down and refused** — his **mark was revealed** to the party in the struggle. They entered anyway, following Judy's vines, until a botched distraction revealed them to a **grick and two giant spiders**. Roll initiative.
